headline: KMS Technology Appoints Jason Wojahn as CEO to Lead the Shift to AI-Native Enterprise Execution
summary: ATLANTA, May 11, 2026--KMS Technology, a leading U.S. based Digital Engineering, Data, and AI company, today announced the appointment of Jason Wojahn as Chief Executive Officer.

headline: 3 Prominent Dividend Stocks To Consider For Your Portfolio
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has risen by 2.2%, and over the past 12 months, it has seen a substantial increase of 31%, with earnings forecasted to grow by 17% annually. In this context of robust growth, identifying dividend stocks that offer reliable income along with potential capital appreciation can be an effective strategy for enhancing portfolio stability and returns.

headline: CTG Appoints Alan Gabriola Vice President of Healthcare
summary: BUFFALO, N.Y., May 11, 2026--CTG, a Cegeka Group company (the "Company"), a leader in IT and business solutions and the Cegeka brand for business in the U.S., today announced that Alan Gabriola has joined CTG as Vice President of Healthcare. In this role, Gabriola will lead CTG’s healthcare growth strategy, strengthen executive client relationships, and continue expanding the company’s healthcare market offerings.

raw.headline: CTG Appoints Alan Gabriola Vice President of Healthcare
raw.summary: BUFFALO, N.Y., May 11, 2026--CTG, a Cegeka Group company (the "Company"), a leader in IT and business solutions and the Cegeka brand for business in the U.S., today announced that Alan Gabriola has joined CTG as Vice President of Healthcare. In this role, Gabriola will lead CTG’s healthcare growth strategy, strengthen executive client relationships, and continue expanding the company’s healthcare market offerings.

headline: How to Maximize Your Retirement Portfolio with These Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks
summary: The traditional ways to plan for your retirement may mean income can no longer cover expenses post-employment. But what if there was another option that could provide a steady, reliable source of income in your nest egg years?

headline: 3 Top Dividend Stocks Yielding Up To 4%
summary: The market has climbed 2.2% in the last 7 days and surged by 31% over the past year, with earnings forecasted to grow by 17% annually. In this dynamic environment, dividend stocks that offer yields up to 4% can provide a steady income stream while potentially benefiting from overall market growth.
